subject: [PATCH 1/4] nfsd: check for FILEID_INVALID in setup_notify_fhandle

2026-05-23.patch_summary: This patch adds a check for the FILEID_INVALID value in the setup_notify_fhandle function to prevent an out-of-bounds read when encoding the file handle onto the wire. The existing check only caught negative return values, but exportfs_encode_inode_fh can also return this invalid value if the buffer is too small. By adding a check for this specific value, the patch ensures that the file handle is encoded correctly and safely.
